name: Petstore
description: This is a sample server Petstore server.  You can find out more about Swagger at [http://swagger.io](http://swagger.io) or on [irc.freenode.net, #swagger](http://swagger.io/irc/).  For this sample, you can use the api key `special-key` to test the authorization filters.
author: OpenJiuwen

api_key.description: API key for Swagger Petstore authentication

tools.name: Uploadfile
tools.description: uploads an image

additionalMetadata.description: Additional data to pass to server

tools.name: Addpet
tools.description: Add a new pet to the store

body.description: Pet object that needs to be added to the store

tools.name: Updatepet
tools.description: Update an existing pet

body.description: Pet object that needs to be added to the store

tools.name: Findpetsbystatus
tools.description: Multiple status values can be provided with comma separated strings

status.description: Status values that need to be considered for filter

tools.name: Findpetsbytags
tools.description: Multiple tags can be provided with comma separated strings. Use tag1, tag2, tag3 for testing.

tools.name: Getpetbyid
tools.description: Returns a single pet

tools.name: Updatepetwithform
tools.description: Updates a pet in the store with form data

petId.description: ID of pet that needs to be updated

tools.name: Deletepet
tools.description: Deletes a pet

tools.name: Getinventory
tools.description: Returns a map of status codes to quantities

tools.name: Placeorder
tools.description: Place an order for a pet

body.description: order placed for purchasing the pet

tools.name: Getorderbyid
tools.description: For valid response try integer IDs with value >= 1 and <= 10. Other values will generated exceptions

orderId.description: ID of pet that needs to be fetched

tools.name: Deleteorder
tools.description: For valid response try integer IDs with positive integer value. Negative or non-integer values will generate API errors

orderId.description: ID of the order that needs to be deleted

tools.name: Createuserswithlistinput
tools.description: Creates list of users with given input array

tools.name: Getuserbyname
tools.description: Get user by user name

username.description: The name that needs to be fetched. Use user1 for testing.

tools.name: Updateuser
tools.description: This can only be done by the logged in user.

username.description: name that need to be updated

tools.name: Deleteuser
tools.description: This can only be done by the logged in user.

username.description: The name that needs to be deleted

tools.name: Loginuser
tools.description: Logs user into the system

password.description: The password for login in clear text

tools.name: Logoutuser
tools.description: Logs out current logged in user session

tools.name: Createuserswitharrayinput
tools.description: Creates list of users with given input array

tools.name: Createuser
tools.description: This can only be done by the logged in user.
